prompt:
A cinematic fashion editorial shot of a modest female model wearing a loose tunic set and hijab, standing confidently in a minimal studio. Keep the same pose, front-facing, relaxed stance. Outfit in aesthetic neutral tones (soft beige / warm taupe). Background is textured concrete with dim, moody lighting and soft shadows for a premium cinematic feel. Remove all original text and branding.

Add elegant branding: “A&H” at the top in a luxury serif font. Add very large, faded word “PREMIUM" in the background behind the model (low opacity, wide spacing). Color grading should be warm, slightly desaturated, high-end fashion look. Soft light falloff, subtle vignette, editorial style, ultra clean composition, high resolution.
